scope: Audit-only Play/Game pruning plan. No app behavior changed.

scoringScale.maintenanceBurden: 1 to 5, where 1 is low burden and 5 is high burden.

activities.title: Prompt Run
activities.notes: The strongest capstone for the day-in-the-life prompt story. It is also long and closer to an interactive worksheet than a small game.
activities.recommendedNextAction: Keep as the featured capstone; tighten copy and transitions, then make the prompt trace feel more continuous.

activities.title: Context Stack
activities.notes: A clean tactile model of limited context. It directly counters the memory misconception.
activities.recommendedNextAction: Keep in the final slate; later add optional RAG/evidence cards to strengthen the context-to-grounding bridge.

activities.title: Attention Weave
activities.notes: Good concept and misconception target, but the current single-example arc drawing has limited replay depth.
activities.recommendedNextAction: Revise into Attention Match with several tiny sentence examples and immediate relation feedback.

activities.title: Token Pipeline Relay
activities.notes: Compact and mobile-friendly, but pass/transform/hold is too abstract for the core Prompt Life mental model.
activities.recommendedNextAction: Remove from the final Play slate or merge the useful determinism idea into Prompt Run sampling.

activities.title: Glossary Dojo
activities.notes: The most mature practice system: 12-question rounds, glossary-sourced choices, non-competitive mastery, and precise feedback.
activities.recommendedNextAction: Keep. Continue wording and mobile feedback QA, but keep it independent from Journey progress.

activities.title: How AI Learns
activities.notes: Important durable-versus-temporary content, but it behaves like a Journey companion rather than a Play game.
activities.recommendedNextAction: Merge its strongest distinctions into Journey review and Prompt Run support instead of keeping it as a final Play card.

recommendedFinalSlate.title: Prompt Run
recommendedFinalSlate.learningObjective: Trace one prompt through tokenization, embeddings, layers, logits, softmax, sampling, append, and repeat.
recommendedFinalSlate.playerAction: Label, connect, choose, append, and order the inference loop.
recommendedFinalSlate.successCondition: Learner completes the full prompt trace and distinguishes inference from training, memory, and consciousness myths.
recommendedFinalSlate.wrongActionFeedback: Explain the specific model move and point back to the correct step.
recommendedFinalSlate.whyItBelongs: It is the capstone for the day-in-the-life prompt story and the only current Play activity with full-loop coverage.

recommendedFinalSlate.title: Context Stack
recommendedFinalSlate.learningObjective: Understand the context window as temporary visible input, not permanent memory.
recommendedFinalSlate.playerAction: Push cards into a limited context window and watch older cards fall out.
recommendedFinalSlate.successCondition: Request, example, and tone remain visible when the output card arrives.
recommendedFinalSlate.wrongActionFeedback: Name which important card fell out and why the model can no longer use it.
recommendedFinalSlate.whyItBelongs: It is the clearest small game and directly supports context, RAG, grounding, and hallucination literacy.

recommendedFinalSlate.title: Attention Match
recommendedFinalSlate.learningObjective: Understand attention as weighted relevance between token positions, not human attention or awareness.
recommendedFinalSlate.playerAction: Connect a target token to the source token or phrase it most depends on.
recommendedFinalSlate.successCondition: Learner correctly matches relevance links across several tiny sentence examples.
recommendedFinalSlate.wrongActionFeedback: Explain why the selected source is less relevant and why the correct source matters.
recommendedFinalSlate.whyItBelongs: Attention is a core mystery-reducing concept, but it needs a clearer diagnostic mechanic than the current single arc.

recommendedFinalSlate.title: Probability Picker
recommendedFinalSlate.sourceActivity: Future activity, not implemented in v0.26
recommendedFinalSlate.learningObjective: Understand logits, softmax, sampling, uncertainty, and why generation chooses one next token from probabilities.
recommendedFinalSlate.playerAction: Compare candidate next tokens, adjust a simple temperature control, and choose from probability-shaped options.
recommendedFinalSlate.successCondition: Learner predicts how probability shape changes likely next-token choices without treating the model as certain.
recommendedFinalSlate.wrongActionFeedback: Distinguish possible vocabulary tokens from probable tokens in the current context.
recommendedFinalSlate.whyItBelongs: Decision Room concepts currently need a stronger standalone practice activity.

recommendedFinalSlate.title: Glossary Dojo
recommendedFinalSlate.learningObjective: Build durable vocabulary for model literacy through definitions, relationships, and common mix-ups.
recommendedFinalSlate.playerAction: Answer 12 calm glossary questions with four choices and no scoring pressure.
recommendedFinalSlate.successCondition: Learner completes practice rounds and sees term-level feedback and mastery over time.
recommendedFinalSlate.wrongActionFeedback: Identify what term the wrong answer belongs to and restate the correct term's meaning.
recommendedFinalSlate.whyItBelongs: A vocabulary-rich app needs a replayable practice engine, and Dojo is already mature.
recommendedFinalSlate.implementationDifficulty: low for maintenance, high for major question-engine changes

screenshots.qaSummary: No horizontal overflow was reported in the captured 320px and 390px states.

verification.build: passed with existing Vite large-chunk warning
verification.buildPages: passed with existing Vite large-chunk warning

knownIssues: Prompt Run is rich but long.
Token Pipeline Relay has weak conceptual fit.
How AI Learns duplicates Journey-style teaching.
Attention Weave needs more diagnostic replay value.
